summary: Software engineering student passionate about technology and the creation of innovative solutions. With experience in multiple programming languages and technologies, I specialize in developing unique web applications with a strong focus on design and user experience.

highlights: Developed communication and customer service skills by interacting daily with guests from different cultures.
Improved my English proficiency while coordinating recreational activities in an English-speaking environment.
Designed and implemented dynamic lesson plans to prepare students for the Argentine Mathematical Olympiad (OMA), fostering critical thinking and problem-solving skills.
Guided students in advanced mathematical concepts, helping them improve their performance in competitions.
Won the class gold medal for academic excellence.
Participated multiple times in the Argentine Mathematical Olympiad (OMA), reaching the national stage.

projects.name: RhinosApp
projects.description: ERP for food distributors in Argentina and Latin America
highlights: Together with a team of Software Engineering students and business professionals, we developed a specialized ERP for food distributors in Argentina.
Used NextJS for the frontend and backend, and Supabase as the database.
